items.name_cn:
-
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE VANITY Makeup Pouch 👜
This classic makeup bag is inspired by the MAISON CE makeup bag,
It brings new life to the handbag series this season, and the size is just right.
Practical, versatile, and exquisite, the name comes from its CE shape.
CE VANITY is the first season launch, made of natural calfskin, CE's most noble original leather, sturdy texture, and can be shaped into a delicate and distinct structure! Inspired by the Triomphe chain.
The tan leather trim is a CE TRIOMPHE CANVAS feature!
Style No.: 119462
Color: Monogram Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18x12x18cm

'Celine'
👑Celine Model: 8001 [Embroidery Collection] Love it! The embroidery collection is here! Get your retro vibe on~ It has a different feel from the Monogram, I love them both~ This popular crossbody bag is super versatile. The shape is retro, cool, and a bit cute. Super exquisite and compact♡
I've always loved C E L I NE. This minimalist style is retro and stylish. This lightweight and easy-to-match vintage bag, do you like it?
Dimensions: 25x14x7cm

items.name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
👑 Spring/Summer New Arrival BESACE TRIOMPHE, a VVIP latest style and pre-order from the official website
Style No.: Size: 24.5×17x4cm, Chain Length: 30cm
Triomphe Black & Gold BESACE TRIOMPHE glossy calfskin chain. Overall Style: Very grand. Black & Gold is still the classic, so gorgeous.
#Length has been increased, so it won't feel like a shoulder bag anymore.
Weight isn't light, but acceptable. The bag body uses hard calfskin with plenty of capacity for a phone, powder, tissues, and earphones!
Wear it with a motorcycle leather jacket, it's just too cool. Go for it.
